title: Faster Boat and Minecart Recipes│更快的船與礦車配方
description: Added faster recipes for furnaces, chests, TNT, hopper minecarts, and chest boats.│新增了熔爐、箱子、TNT、漏斗礦車和箱船的快速配方。
body:
# Function│功能
A faster and more convenient crafting recipe has been added, allowing players to craft ships and minecarts with blocks directly without crafting ships or minecarts first.│添加了更快速且方便的合成配方，使玩家無須先合成船或礦車，可直接合成帶有方塊的船與礦車。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
